titles.text: Wagamama Fairy: Mirumo de Pon! Hachinin no Toki no Yousei

descriptions.text: Wagamama Fairy: Mirumo de Pon! Hachinin no Toki no Yousei is an adventure video game which was was developed by Jupiter Corporation and published by Konami and released for Game Boy Advance on December 11, 2003 in Japan. This game is based of the Manga and Anime series Selfish Fairy Mirumo De Pon!.
